description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) related endpoints, including '/summary' and '/trends', which invoke service functions to compute OEE summaries and trends, respectively.

methods.name: requireAuth
methods.description: Middleware function to require authentication for route access.

methods.name: computeOeeSummary
methods.description: Service function computing OEE summary based on provided parameters.

methods.name: computeOeeTrends
methods.description: Service function computing OEE trend points based on provided parameters.
